synopsis: [El-errata] ELBA-2025-23328 Oracle Linux 9 qemu-kvm bug fix and enhancement update
overview: Oracle Linux Bug Fix Advisory ELBA-2025-23328
description:
[9.1.0-29.el9_7.3]
- kvm-io-move-websock-resource-release-to-close-method.patch [RHEL-120125]
- kvm-io-fix-use-after-free-in-websocket-handshake-code.patch [RHEL-120125]
- Resolves: RHEL-120125
  (CVE-2025-11234 qemu-kvm: VNC WebSocket handshake use-after-free [rhel-9.7.z])

[9.1.0-29.el9_7.2]
- kvm-io-move-websock-resource-release-to-close-method.patch [RHEL-120125]
- kvm-io-fix-use-after-free-in-websocket-handshake-code.patch [RHEL-120125]
- Resolves: RHEL-120125
  (CVE-2025-11234 qemu-kvm: VNC WebSocket handshake use-after-free [rhel-9.7.z])

[9.1.0-29.el9_7.1]
- kvm-arm-kvm-report-registers-we-failed-to-set.patch [RHEL-120502]
- Resolves: RHEL-120502
  ([rhel9] Backport 'arm/kvm: report registers we failed to set' [rhel-9.7.z])
full_text:
Oracle Linux Bug Fix Advisory ELBA-2025-23328

http://linux.oracle.com/errata/ELBA-2025-23328.html

The following updated rpms for Oracle Linux 9 have been uploaded to the Unbreakable Linux Network:

x86_64:
qemu-guest-agent-9.1.0-29.el9_7.3.x86_64.rpm
qemu-img-9.1.0-29.el9_7.3.x86_64.rpm
